entries.name: subscription-advance-dunning
entries.purpose: Every 6 hours: progress past_due subscriptions through grace stages. Frequent enough to keep dunning responsive; not so frequent as to spam workspace owners.

entries.name: subscription-expire-trials
entries.purpose: Hourly: TrialEnding warnings + transition expired trials.

entries.name: subscription-reconcile-cashier
entries.purpose: Hourly at :30 — reconciliation check against Cashier for drift detection.
